phrases.intent_en: When does the last entry start?
phrases.text_local: V kolik hodin začíná poslední vstup?
phrases.cultural_note: Czech museums typically close at 18:00 with the last entry one hour before closing.

likely_response.translation_en: The last entry is at 5 p.m.

responses.english: The last entry is at 5 p.m.

phrases.intent_en: Is the gift shop before or after exit?
phrases.text_local: Je obchod se suvenýry před nebo za východem?
phrases.cultural_note: Museum gift shops in the Czech Republic are often placed after the ticket checkpoint.

likely_response.local: Je hned za východem z budovy.
likely_response.translation_en: It is right after the building exit.

responses.english: It is right after the building exit.
responses.french: Je hned za východem z budovy.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I return the audio guide?
phrases.cultural_note: Audio guides are typically returned at a desk near the exit, not the entrance.

likely_response.local: V přízemí u východu z expozice.
likely_response.translation_en: On the ground floor by the exhibition exit.

responses.english: On the ground floor by the exhibition exit.
responses.french: V přízemí u východu z expozice.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the combined brewery ticket desk?
phrases.text_local: Kde je pokladna na kombinovanou vstupenku s pivovarským muzeem?
phrases.cultural_note: Combined tickets are common, so the cashier gives a precise location without hesitation.

likely_response.translation_en: Right by the main entrance on the left.

responses.english: Right by the main entrance on the left.
